general.name: Xcreds Login
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4CA6DEBD-7072-48F5-A7F4-67703430D7F8</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks Cloud Services</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>com.github.erikberglund.ProfileCreator.4CA6DEBD-7072-48F5-A7F4-67703430D7F8</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Xcreds Login</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Xcreds configuration</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>redirectURI</key><string>xcreds://auth/</string><key>cloudLoginText</key><string>Sign in with your Azure AD credentials</string><key>map_username</key><string>user.userPrincipalName</string><key>clientID</key><string>1893f58f-5fd8-4b18-bff7-fde2a9ed0a57</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Configures XCreds configuration preferences</string><key>map_lastname</key><string>user.surname</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string/><key>shouldShowCloudLoginByDefault</key><true/><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>com.github.erikberglund.ProfileCreator.4CA6DEBD-7072-48F5-A7F4-67703430D7F8.com.twocanoes.xcreds.F1FA4AD8-C0E6-480E-903F-39A7B2E5107D</string><key>passwordChangeURL</key><string>https://www.myaccount.microsoft.com</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F1FA4AD8-C0E6-480E-903F-39A7B2E5107D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.twocanoes.xcreds</string><key>map_fullname</key><string>user.displayName</string><key>loginWindowBackgroundImageURL</key><string>file:///Users/Shared/hbcbackground.jpeg</string><key>shouldShowSupportStatus</key><true/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>map_firstname</key><string>user.givenName</string><key>scopes</key><string>profile openid offline_access</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>XCreds</string><key>discoveryURL</key><string>https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/.well-known/openid-configuration</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
